description_long: This house complex consists of three distinct rectangular residential units arranged around a central open courtyard, connected by a stone path. The units feature a mix of modern and industrial design elements, with flat and slightly sloped roofs, large windows, and a combination of light and dark exterior wall finishes. A carport with a white canopy shelters several vehicles adjacent to one of the units, indicating dedicated parking space. The courtyard includes outdoor seating and landscaping, enhancing the communal atmosphere. The windows are arranged in both horizontal strips and large vertical panes, providing ample natural light. The overall structure appears modular, with each unit having its own entryway and outdoor access.
description: A modern modular house complex with three rectangular units, a central courtyard, and a carport with multiple vehicles. The design features flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the central courtyard, the main entryways, and the carport on the right with vehicles parked underneath.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the complex, the full length of the carport, and the back facades of the house units.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a top-down perspective, clearly displaying the courtyard layout, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of the three house units.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back and side facades of the units, showing the modular structure and the carport from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple modern doors, some with small overhangs or steps, and direct access to the central courtyard.
